intro: Between April 13 and April 20, 2026, ZCyberNews published five articles detailing vulnerabilities and threats targeting Windows Server environments. The reporting covered a mix of security issues, including one critical, two high, and two medium severity events. These incidents demonstrated a global impact, with the education, enterprise, and government sectors being the most frequently affected. The coverage reflects the ongoing focus required to secure foundational enterprise infrastructure against a diverse range of security challenges during this period.
